title: ipomoea batatas var. erythrorrhiza
intro: Ipomoea batatas var. erythrorrhiza, also known as the purple yam, is a variety of the sweet potato plant that is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea batatas var. erythrorrhiza include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and tubers are often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
